lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents, and the interior shows moderate wear. It is operational but will require some upcoming maintenance and minor repairs.

Looking for a reliable ride that gets the job done without breaking the bank? This vehicle is a solid, dependable choice that’s ready for its next adventure! While it shows some honest wear from its years on the road, it remains a functional and practical option for anyone seeking value. The interior is comfortable, and it drives well, making it a great budget-friendly pick for your daily commute!

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-quality condition. Every aspect of this car, from the flawless paint finish with no scratches or swirls to the pristine leather interior that shows zero signs of wear, has been meticulously maintained. It has always been garage-kept and professionally detailed. Mechanically, it is perfect, with a full service history and all maintenance up to date. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did when it first left the dealership.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and some minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and signs of use. The engine and transmission are functional but may need servicing in the near future.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owners. The engine runs reliably and the transmission shifts smoothly, with no major mechanical issues to report. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, showing only minor wear consistent with regular use. The exterior paint is in good shape, though there are a few small stone chips on the front fascia and a light scuff on the rear fender. All safety features and electronic components are fully operational. It is a solid, dependable car that is ready for daily driving.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which stands as a testament to disciplined ownership and consistent mechanical care. Having passed our comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile offers a refined balance of performance and long-term reliability. It remains in a commendable state, featuring a clean interior and a robust powertrain designed for the sophisticated motorist. This offering represents a superior acquisition for those who demand institutional-grade quality and proven dependability.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved and maintained over the years. This car is perfect for someone looking for a dependable vehicle that still looks great hitting the road. I’ve taken wonderful care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love it as much as I have! Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive soon!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This high-revving powerplant utilizes individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS variable valve timing to produce a broad, responsive power band. Mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain delivers power through a variable M differential lock for superior lateral traction. The chassis maintains excellent torsional rigidity, and the rear subframe has been proactively inspected for structural integrity. Recent service includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and cooling system refresh. While the aesthetics reflect its status as a well-enjoyed driver’s car, the performance metrics remain sharp, providing the
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the ideal balance between performance and practicality. It has been kept in a smoke-free environment and has strictly adhered to a comprehensive service schedule, ensuring mechanical reliability. The exterior finish remains vibrant with only minor, expected signs of careful use, while the interior is remarkably clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully operational electronics. The engine is responsive and the transmission shifts smoothly, providing a confident and comfortable ride. This is a solid, dependable car that has been cared for by a detail-oriented owner and is ready for many more miles of enjoyment.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and sophisticated design. This unit has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and aesthetic preservation. Offering a balanced synthesis of value and quality, it serves as an ideal selection for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical excellence and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that aligns with our dealership's exacting standards. A versatile and reliable investment, this specimen has been thoroughly vetted to ensure continued performance and long-term value.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that's been treated with lots of love? I'm parting with my trusty car, and she's in really great shape! It runs like a dream and is perfect for those weekend getaways or just your daily commute. I've taken good care of it, and I know you'll love driving it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut with a functional Electronic Damper Control (EDC) system and a precise M-Variable differential lock ensuring optimal torque distribution. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The 7-speed M Double-Clutch Transmission (DCT) offers lightning-fast shifts. While showing honest signs of use consistent with its mileage, the mechanical integrity and structural rigidity remain uncompromised, offering a pure driver-centric experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior presents beautifully with its original high-gloss finish, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the premium leather upholstery remains supple, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in strong standing, having undergone regular scheduled maintenance. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts with precision, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. It’s a reliable, turn-key example that looks as good in the driveway as it feels on the open road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this motorcar balances superior performance with enduring value.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and features a well-preserved interior that reflects its careful ownership history. With a focus on reliability and aesthetic distinction, this offering stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated and dependable driving experience.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really wonderful shape—super reliable and has clearly been well-loved over the years. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready to hit the road with you today! It’s clean, runs smoothly, and is just waiting for its next adventure. Come take a look, I'd love to see it go to a great home!

This 997-generation Carrera offers a visceral driving experience powered by a 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six engine featuring VarioCam Plus for a broad, accessible torque curve. The 6-speed manual transaxle provides mechanical tactile feedback, paired with a chassis that retains excellent torsional rigidity. Performance is bolstered by a factory-spec multi-link rear suspension and four-piston monoblock calipers, ensuring precise turn-in and consistent thermal management during spirited driving. The vehicle has been maintained with an emphasis on mechanical longevity, including a documented IMS bearing retrofit and recent fluid analysis. While the exterior displays a light patina reflective of its mileage, the hydraulic steering rack remains communicative and the drivetrain is exceptionally tight, making this an ideal driver-spec example for the purist.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. No mechanical issues. Clean interior.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable daily driver that has been treated with genuine care. The exterior finish retains a high gloss, showing only the minor, superficial stone chips one would expect from careful road use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free, with all upholstery, buttons, and digital displays functioning exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in strong health; it has followed a consistent service schedule, resulting in a smooth engine idle and crisp gear shifts. The suspension feels tight, the brakes are responsive, and the tires have significant tread life remaining. It is a solid, honest car that delivers a premium driving experience without the 'new car' price tag.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies a refined balance of sophisticated engineering and consistent maintenance. This unit remains in commendable condition, offering reliable performance and a well-preserved interior. It stands as a testament to quality stewardship and represents a superior value proposition for the discerning professional seeking both prestige and proven mechanical integrity.

Presented in commendable condition, this vehicle exemplifies a high standard of mechanical reliability and aesthetic preservation. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it offers a sophisticated driving experience that aligns with the expectations of a discerning owner. This represents an exceptional opportunity to acquire a well-appointed asset that balances enduring performance with refined value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready to go! It's been well-loved and well-maintained, so you’re getting a great vehicle that still has tons of life left in it. Come take it for a spin—you’re gonna love how it handles!

This 996-generation Carrera 4S features the iconic wide-body silhouette and a 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six, delivering linear power through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The M96 powerplant has been proactively serviced with an LN Engineering IMS bearing retrofit to ensure structural longevity. Its viscous-coupling AWD system provides exceptional mechanical grip, complemented by a factory-tuned suspension that remains tight and communicative. Recent preventative maintenance includes a cooling system refresh and bore-scoping to verify cylinder wall integrity. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the drivetrain remains robust with sharp throttle response and a clean oil analysis. A mechanically sound, driver-focused example ready for the apex.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience that perfectly balances performance and comfort. The exterior maintains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor signs of careful use such as light stone chips on the lower front fascia. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is free of cracks or stains, and the interior retains its original freshness. Every feature, including the panoramic sunroof, navigation system, and heated seats, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, this car has been treated with the utmost care, following a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It features a smooth-shifting transmission, responsive handling, and a quiet, efficient engine. Recently fitted with a fresh set of high-performance tires and having just completed its annual service, this car is truly ready for the road with no immediate work required. A reliable and well-documented example for a discerning buyer.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and reliability, having been maintained to a rigorous standard. It offers a refined driving experience characterized by a well-preserved interior and robust mechanical integrity. A premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated vehicle that delivers consistent excellence on the road.
